name: Custard-Based Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions; drain and rinse with cold water.
2. Combine milk, salt, sugar, butter, vanilla, and eggs with the rice; beat well.
3. Add raisins and mix lightly with a fork.
4. Grease a baking dish and pour the mixture in.
5. Bake at 350 degrees until set and a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
